title: Esme and the Magic Classroom
synopsis: When Esme finds a magic wand in her classroom's lost-and-found box, everything starts turning into fairy tale objects! With help from her diverse group of classmates, she must figure out how to reverse the magic before their teacher returns.

pages.text: Esme loved school. She had curly red hair and freckles on her nose. Today, she was helping Ms. Chen clean up the classroom. "Can you check the lost-and-found box?" asked Ms. Chen. Esme nodded and walked to the colorful box in the corner.

illustration.description: A bright, cheerful classroom with colorful posters on the walls. Esme, a young girl with curly red hair and freckles, stands near a rainbow-colored lost-and-found box. Ms. Chen, an Asian teacher with kind eyes and a warm smile, points toward the box. Sunlight streams through large windows.
illustration.alt: Esme in her classroom looking at the lost-and-found box

pages.text: Inside the box, Esme found mittens, a hat, and something sparkly. She picked up a silver wand with a golden star on top. "Pretty!" she said. The wand felt warm in her hand. It started to glow with tiny rainbow lights.

illustration.description: Close-up of Esme's hands holding a magical silver wand topped with a glowing golden star. Rainbow sparkles dance around the wand. Esme's eyes are wide with wonder and excitement. The background shows the inside of the lost-and-found box with various colorful items.
illustration.alt: Esme holding a glowing magic wand with rainbow sparkles

pages.text: "What did you find?" Ms. Chen asked. But when Esme turned around, Ms. Chen was gone! In her place stood a tall bookshelf full of fairy tale books. "Oh no!" said Esme. "What happened?"

illustration.description: Esme stands in the middle of the classroom, still holding the glowing wand, looking confused and worried. Where Ms. Chen was standing, there's now a tall, magical bookshelf filled with colorful fairy tale books that seem to shimmer. The classroom looks slightly more magical with sparkles in the air.
illustration.alt: Esme looking confused as Ms. Chen has been transformed into a bookshelf

pages.text: Just then, her friends came back from recess. There was Marcus with his dark skin and big smile. Aisha wore her colorful hijab. And Jin had his lucky dinosaur shirt on. "Esme, why is there a bookshelf where Ms. Chen was?" asked Marcus.

illustration.description: Three diverse children enter the classroom looking surprised. Marcus, a Black boy with a bright smile and short hair, points at the bookshelf. Aisha, wearing a beautiful purple hijab with golden patterns, looks puzzled. Jin, an Asian boy in a green dinosaur t-shirt, has his mouth open in surprise.
illustration.alt: Esme's diverse group of friends looking surprised at the magical bookshelf

pages.text: "I think this wand is magic!" Esme said. She pointed it at a chair. POOF! The chair turned into a giant pumpkin. "Wow!" said Aisha. "Just like Cinderella!" Jin clapped his hands. "Do it again!"

illustration.description: The classroom is becoming more magical. A large orange pumpkin sits where a chair used to be. Esme holds the wand with determination while her three friends watch in amazement. Sparkles and magical dust swirl around the room. Their expressions show excitement and wonder.
illustration.alt: A chair transformed into a pumpkin while the children watch in amazement

pages.text: But then more things started changing on their own! The whiteboard became a magic mirror. The pencils turned into magic beans. The fish tank became a wishing well. "This is getting crazy!" said Marcus. "We need to fix this before Ms. Chen comes back!"

illustration.description: The classroom is now completely transformed into a fairy tale wonderland. A ornate magic mirror hangs where the whiteboard was, pencils have become climbing bean stalks, and a stone wishing well bubbles where the fish tank used to be. The four children stand in the middle looking overwhelmed but determined.
illustration.alt: The classroom completely transformed into a fairy tale setting with magical objects everywhere

pages.text: "Maybe if I wave it backwards?" Esme said. She waved the wand from right to left. But instead of fixing things, the desks turned into gingerbread houses! "Oops," said Esme. The room smelled like cookies and candy.

illustration.description: The classroom now has adorable gingerbread house desks with candy decorations and frosting details. Esme waves the wand frantically while looking worried. Her friends are both amazed and concerned. The lighting is warm and cozy, with a magical glow emanating from all the transformed objects.
illustration.alt: Classroom desks transformed into gingerbread houses while Esme waves the wand

pages.text: "Try saying magic words!" suggested Aisha. Esme held up the wand. "Abracadabra!" she said loudly. The classroom door turned into a castle gate! "That made it worse!" laughed Jin. But he was a little worried too.

illustration.description: Esme stands with the wand raised high above her head, mouth open as she shouts the magic words. The classroom door has become an ornate medieval castle gate with iron hinges and decorative stones. Her friends watch with mixed expressions of amusement and concern. Magical sparkles fill the air around them.
illustration.alt: Esme shouting magic words as the door transforms into a castle gate

pages.text: Marcus had an idea. "In fairy tales, you have to really mean it," he said. "Think about what you really want." Esme closed her eyes tight. She thought about Ms. Chen and their normal, fun classroom. She really, really wanted everything back to normal.

illustration.description: Esme stands in the center with her eyes squeezed shut, concentrating hard while holding the wand close to her heart. Marcus stands beside her encouragingly. The magical classroom surrounds them with all its fairy tale transformations. Warm, hopeful light begins to glow around Esme as she focuses on her wish.
illustration.alt: Esme concentrating hard with closed eyes while Marcus encourages her

pages.text: "I wish for our classroom to be normal again," Esme said with all her heart. "And I wish for Ms. Chen to come back safe." The wand glowed brighter and brighter. Golden sparkles filled the whole room.

illustration.description: Esme holds the wand up with both hands, her face showing pure determination and hope. Brilliant golden light radiates from the wand, filling the entire magical classroom. Her three friends stand close by, watching with anticipation. The light is so bright it begins to wash out all the fairy tale transformations.
illustration.alt: Esme holding the wand with brilliant golden light filling the classroom

pages.text: WHOOSH! Everything spun around like a tornado made of stars. When the light faded, their classroom looked normal again! The desks were desks. The whiteboard was a whiteboard. And there was Ms. Chen, smiling at them!

illustration.description: The classroom is back to normal with regular desks, whiteboard, and familiar decorations. Ms. Chen stands where the bookshelf was, looking exactly as she did before, with a warm and knowing smile. The four children look relieved and happy. Only a few tiny sparkles remain in the air, suggesting the magic that just occurred.
illustration.alt: The classroom restored to normal with Ms. Chen back and the children looking relieved

pages.text: "Did you find anything interesting in the lost-and-found?" Ms. Chen asked with a twinkle in her eye. Esme looked at her hand. The wand was still there, but now it looked like a regular pencil. She winked at her friends. "Just a pencil," Esme said. "But it might be a little bit magic."

illustration.description: Esme holds up what now appears to be an ordinary yellow pencil, but her friends can see the faintest shimmer around it. Ms. Chen has a mysterious, knowing smile. The four children share a secret look of understanding and friendship. The classroom is bathed in warm, natural sunlight streaming through the windows.
illustration.alt: Esme holding a pencil that was once the magic wand, sharing a secret moment with her friends

pages.text: At the end of the school day, the friends walked together. "That was the best day ever!" said Jin. "Even when it was scary, we fixed it together," added Aisha. Marcus nodded. "That's real magic - helping each other."

illustration.description: The four friends walk together down a sunny school hallway toward the exit. They're chatting and smiling, clearly happy and bonded by their shared adventure. Their backpacks bounce as they walk, and warm afternoon sunlight streams through the hallway windows, creating a golden, peaceful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: The four friends walking together down the school hallway, happy and united

pages.text: Esme put the special pencil in her backpack. She knew tomorrow would bring new adventures with her best friends. And maybe, just maybe, a little bit of magic too. After all, the best magic happens when friends work together.

illustration.description: Esme carefully places the pencil (with just a hint of magical shimmer) into her colorful backpack. She's standing outside the school with her three friends in the background, all waving goodbye. The school building looks warm and welcoming behind them. The sky has the golden tones of late afternoon, suggesting the perfect end to a magical day.
illustration.alt: Esme putting the magical pencil in her backpack as friends wave goodbye outside school

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Esme find in the lost-and-found box?
questions.explanation: Esme found a silver wand with a golden star on top that turned out to be magical!

questions.question: What happened to Ms. Chen when the magic started?
questions.explanation: Ms. Chen was transformed into a tall bookshelf full of fairy tale books.

questions.question: Which of Esme's friends wore a colorful hijab?
questions.explanation: Aisha wore a beautiful colorful hijab and helped Esme try to solve the magic problem.

questions.question: How did Esme finally fix the magic?
choices: She wished with all her heart
questions.explanation: Esme had to really mean it and wish with all her heart for things to return to normal.

questions.question: What did the magic wand look like at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: The wand looked like a regular pencil at the end, but Esme thought it might still be a little bit magic.

pages.title: Fill in the Magic Words
pages.instruction: Complete the sentences from the story!
pages.text: Esme found a magic _____ in the lost-and-found box. When she waved it, Ms. Chen turned into a _____. The friends worked _____ to fix everything!

pages.title: Magical Transformations
pages.instruction: What did these classroom items turn into?
pages.text: The chair became a _____. The desks turned into _____ houses. The door became a castle _____!
